top3.sql:
SELECT p.ID, l.ALP 
FROM Patient p 
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID 
WHERE p.Birthday = '1982-04-01';

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN l.ALP BETWEEN 40 AND 130 THEN 'Within normal range'
        ELSE 'Outside normal range'
    END AS ALP_Status
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = '1982-04-01';

SELECT p.ID, l.ALP 
FROM Patient p 
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID 
WHERE p.Birthday = '1982-04-01';

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN l.ALP BETWEEN 40 AND 130 THEN 'Within normal range'
        ELSE 'Outside normal range'
    END AS ALP_Status
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = '1982-04-01';

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN l.ALP IS NOT NULL AND l.ALP BETWEEN 40 AND 130 THEN 'Within normal range'
        ELSE 'Outside normal range or not measured'
    END AS ALP_Status
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = '1982-04-01';

SELECT p.ID, l.ALP 
FROM Patient p 
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID 
WHERE p.Birthday = '1982-04-01';

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN l.ALP BETWEEN 40 AND 130 THEN 'Within normal range'
        ELSE 'Outside normal range'
    END AS ALP_Status
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = '1982-04-01';

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN l.ALP IS NOT NULL AND l.ALP BETWEEN 40 AND 130 THEN 'Within normal range'
        ELSE 'Outside normal range or not measured'
    END AS ALP_Status
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = '1982-04-01';

final.sql:
SELECT p.ID, l.ALP 
FROM Patient p 
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID 
WHERE p.Birthday = '1982-04-01';
